title: 102 Dalmatians
review_summary: The reviewer enjoys 101 Dalmatians: Reunion and finds it better paced with engaging humor compared to its predecessor; despite some disbelief about Cruella's transformation, it's a positive family experience.

title: Holes
review_summary: "Holes" offers an engaging blend of humor, mystery, and adventure based on Louis Sachar's novel; praised for its unique storyline appealing both kids and adults.

title: Stardust
review_summary: A refreshing fairy tale grounded with humanism and humor rather than grandiose epics like Lord of Rings or Eragon; strong acting makes it worth seeing despite its humble marketing efforts.

title: Ice Age
review_summary: A touching animation portraying themes of friendship, bravery during a perilous Ice Age journey involving diverse animals like sloths, mammals, tigers. Despite many dangers faced collectively with help from unlikely allies against their own kind for survival purposes; ultimately reinforcing positive behavior's rewards through unity among varied species.
